# Camilla Morgan

Tyler, Texas

Message Camilla

##### About me

Hello, I'm Cam—a passionate birth and postpartum doula on a mission to provide unwavering support to individuals and families throughout the incredible journey of childbirth and early parenthood. My own transformative experiences as a mother ignited a deep commitment to empower and nurture others during this pivotal chapter of life, leading me to embark on the fulfilling path of doula work.

My journey as a birth doula revolves around creating positive and empowering birthing experiences. I'm dedicated to offering emotional encouragement, evidence-based information, and physical comfort to expectant parents as they navigate the intricacies of labor and delivery. Advocating for birthing individuals, I ensure they feel informed, empowered, and supported in making choices aligned with their values and preferences. Seamlessly transitioning into my role as a postpartum doula, I extend support to new parents, providing guidance on newborn care, breastfeeding, and postpartum recovery. My non-judgmental and compassionate approach fosters a secure space, allowing families to thrive during the transformative early days of parenthood.

##### Certification and training

Stillbithday (2024)

##### Specialties

Breastfeeding Assistance and SupportVaginal Birth After Cesarean (VBAC)BabywearingBirth and Lactation Birth DoulaBirth SupportBirth TraumaChildbirth EducationGrief and LossHigh-Risk PregnancyHome BirthInfant CareInfertilityLabor DoulaLatch IssuesLGBTQ+Loss and Bereavement DoulaLow Milk Supply/Over SupplyNatural BirthNatural ChildbirthParenting SupportPostpartum Doula CareWater birth

Show less


Show the rest


##### Languages

English

##### Service introduction

As a dedicated birth and postpartum doula, I offer a comprehensive range of services designed to support individuals and families through the transformative journey of childbirth and early parenthood. Throughout the birthing process, my role as a birth doula involves providing emotional encouragement, evidence-based information, and physical comfort to create a positive and empowering experience. I advocate for birthing individuals, ensuring they feel informed and supported in making choices aligned with their preferences. In the postpartum period, I seamlessly transition into offering guidance on newborn care, breastfeeding, and postpartum recovery. My non-judgmental and compassionate approach creates a nurturing environment, fostering the well-being of families as they navigate the joys and challenges of early parenthood. Whether it's lending a listening ear, offering informational support, or providing hands-on assistance, my goal is to tailor my services to meet the unique needs of each client, empowering them to embark on their parenting journey with confidence and peace of mind.

##### Packages

Pregnancy & Labor Support

Introducing the "Blossom Birth Experience" package—an all-encompassing support package tailored to enhance your birthing journey. This inclusive package offers two prenatal visits, delving into your birth preferences and addressing any concerns, ensuring you're well-prepared for the big day. On the day of delivery, I provide continuous emotional support, comfort measures, and advocacy. Following the birth, you'll receive two postpartum visits for debriefing, newborn care guidance, breastfeeding support, and emotional reassurance. This comprehensive package is designed to empower and support you throughout the transformative experience of childbirth and early parenthood, ensuring a positive and holistic birthing journey.

$950.00


USD Flat rate


Learn more

Nurturing postpartum bliss

Introducing the "Nurturing Postpartum Bliss" package—an all-encompassing postpartum doula care plan crafted to provide comprehensive support during the crucial early weeks of parenthood. With this package, you'll receive personalized assistance from a compassionate postpartum doula, including four in-home visits to address your unique needs. These visits encompass guidance on newborn care, breastfeeding support, emotional reassurance, and practical assistance with household tasks. Whether it's offering a listening ear or sharing evidence-based information, my goal is to create a nurturing environment that fosters your well-being as you navigate the joys and challenges of early parenthood. The "Nurturing Postpartum Bliss" package is designed to ensure you feel supported, empowered, and confident during this transformative chapter of your life.

$35.00


USD Per hour


Learn more

##### Ratings and reviews

Be the first to write Camilla a review!


Write a review

##### Frequently asked questions

Do you support All Births

Yes! Supporting birth diversity is at the forefront of my doula career. I support births from csections to freebirths


How will you involve my partner in the birthing process?

Partner involvement is a key focus of my approach as a doula. I believe in creating a collaborative and supportive environment during the birthing process. In our consultations, we'll discuss and customize a plan that ensures your partner feels engaged and empowered. This may include providing them with tools for comfort measures, coaching on supportive techniques, and ensuring they have a clear understanding of their role in advocating for your preferences. I'm here to enhance the birthing experience for both of you, fostering a shared and positive journey into parenthood.
